response: <<Ava started>> <<with 50 pencils>>. <<At recess>> <<she gave 4 pencils>> <<to her classmate Emma>>. <<Later>> <<she lost 2 pencils>> <<while walking home from school>>. <<In the evening>> <<Ava's dad bought her a new pencil case>> <<with 15 pencils>>. <<Emma came over>> <<and gave Ava three times as many pencils>> <<as she received at recess>>. <<The number of pencils Ava received at recess>> <<was 4 pencils>>. <<So Emma gave her 12 pencils>>. <<Ava now has 50 - 4 - 2 + 15 + 12>> <<pencils>>. <<The total number of pencils Ava ended the day with>> <<is 71 pencils>>. <<Ask if you need further details>> <<about the calculation>>. <<cost>>
